hooks.command: if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1; msg=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//;s/,/, /g'); git commit -m "auto: ${msg:-update}" >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; git push >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0

if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1; msg=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//;s/,/, /g'); git commit -m "auto: ${msg:-update}" >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; git push >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0

if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1; msg=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//;s/,/, /g'); git commit -m "auto: ${msg:-update}" >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; git push >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
